edible_parts: Fruit (historic food; strongly flavored) and heart.
other_uses: Sprawling fan palm forming vast thickets across the Southeastern coastal plain; a top nectar plant.
prep: The ripe black fruit was a traditional food (an intense, divisive flavor) and is the source of the well-known prostate-health supplement; the heart is edible. Grown chiefly as a tough evergreen and premier honey/pollinator plant.
soil: Dry to moist, sandy soils; salt- and fire-tolerant.
risks: Fruit strongly flavored; saw-edged leaf stalks.
buy: Native-plant nurseries and native seed suppliers.
